programme.desc: When Ryan decides to treat the new 9Mag and old 9Mag to a team-building trip in Miami, Charmaine questions her future with 9Mag and an emotional Ryan releases some pent-up anger towards the OGs.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Mandatory team bonding in Miami pays off as Charmaine and Lily put years of beef behind them. Phor makes his triumphant return to the stage. When Lily lashes out at Neek, Ryan's hard-won 9MAG peace goes left. Charmaine faces a heartbreaking decision.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Van defends himself and his artwork against a few unhappy clients causing legal trouble for Ryan. While Don and Ashley view houses at the top of their non-existent budget, a familiar face returns for a second chance at life and love at 9MAG.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The 9MAG crew--past and present--takes over the Chicago Tattoo Convention, digging up buried conspiracy theories and dragging old rivalries into the ground.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: After showing no remorse for tarnishing the 9MAG brand at the Chicago Tattoo Convention, Van fires Lily. Charmaine goes back on her word forcing Neek to give her an ultimatum. Ryan and Phor fly to LA for an appearance on the Steve Harvey show.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Charmaine returns to 9MAG in hopes of getting her job back, Van takes his daughter on a college tour, and Don asks Ashley for another chance at a perfect wedding. A rumor started by an unlikely source gains legs quickly.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Neek plans to surprise Charmaine in South Carolina with a marriage proposal and invites the crew along for the event. A few unexpected guests and a powerful history lesson force everyone to revisit the past and be grateful for the present.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: The happiest day of Charmaine's life is overshadowed by a rumor that won't die. Ryan decides it's time for a change at 9MAG and Don is just the one to make it.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Charmaine bounces back with a shop of her own, with London's hottest black female tattoo artist by her side. Ryan's business excels as his personal life struggles. Don and Ashley get unexpected news.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Zach brokers a deal with Draya in exchange for a date, they flirt with the idea of starting a shop romance. Charmaine and Neek plan for their future together and share some news with their moms. Ryan opens up about some family issues in therapy.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Charmaine announces her pregnancy to the 2nd City crew and tries to appease her unhappy mother-in-law. Jess announces a pajama party at her house and gets a dose of the reality of Chicago life with Prince and Fly.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: Ryan moves up and moves on with a rumored fling visiting from out of town. Don's plan to help Phor and Ryan find love in the club goes left when Ashley crashes the party with her single friends. Zach's arrogance pushes Fly to his breaking point.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la Marina asesinado de la misma manera que sus padres hace una década, se topan con un contenedor de almacenamiento lleno de casas de muñecas que muestran recreaciones de escenas de asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas cuando el cuerpo de un respetado técnico de la Marina, en las reservas es encontrado flotando en un lago donde se lleva a cabo un evento comunitario popular.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Karen y Jimmy son tomados como rehenes en un restaurante después de que el robo de una joyería sale mal, intentan mantener a los otros clientes a salvo de los ladrones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo intenta verificar la identidad de Joe Smith (Christopher Lloyd), quien afirma haber servido en el U.S.S. Arizona durante el ataque a Pearl Harbor, y quiere ser enterrado allí después de su muerte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El juicio de Eddie se ve nublado por su pasado cuando arresta a un conocido detestable de la universidad bajo cargos cuestionables.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Una periodista desaparece mientras investiga un reportaje sobre un hombre inocente condenado por asesinato, Danny y Baez esperan que reexaminar el caso original ayude a encontrarla.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras la UAC continua persiguiendo a los ladrones, el equipo determina que los sospechosos tienen un objetivo más grande en D.C., y con uno del equipo como rehén, tienen que trabajar rápidamente para desactivar una situación explosiva.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo intenta verificar la identidad de Joe Smith (Christopher Lloyd), quien afirma haber servido en el U.S.S. Arizona durante el ataque a Pearl Harbor, y quiere ser enterrado allí después de su muerte.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control of the vehicle and runs into a stop sign. With the aid of stop sticks, a driver’s car becomes disabled. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a drug house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicyclist with a warrant pedals into the desert to avoid Deputies. Surveillance cameras identify suspects in a beer run. A man in love struggles with his girlfriend's addictive behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected animal cruelty call, a fight between neighbors turns violent, and deputies question a suspicious group behind a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gives Officers a fake name when he's stopped on a bike with no lights. Officers initiate a high-risk traffic stop on a reckless driver. A man is caught walking in traffic on the Vegas Strip.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Fragmentos de Abril
programme.desc: April Burns es una hija rebelde que se ha ofrecido a realizar una cena de Acción de Gracias para los más desfavorecidos en su apartamento de East Side. Pero sus intentos de crear una fiesta inolvidable fracasan cuando descubre que su horno no funciona.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: El hombre del oeste
programme.desc: El legendario Gary Cooper muestra por qué siempre será una de las estrellas más auténticas de la pantalla. El retrato, capaz y vulnerable, que Cooper ofrece de un antiguo forajido perseguido por su propio pasado, destaca entre sus mejores momentos.

programme.title: Gator el confidente
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds interpreta a un contrabandista que declara la guerra a policías corruptos en un espectáculo de acción lleno de persecuciones de coches y peleas, contando además con las estelares interpretaciones de Ned Beatty, Diane Ladd y Bo Hopkins.

programme.title: Un tiro en la noche
programme.desc: Un senador, que se hizo famoso por matar a un famoso forajido, regresa para el funeral de un viejo amigo y cuenta la verdad sobre lo que ocurrió.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: Hasta que llegó su hora
programme.desc: La historia épica de un misterioso desconocido con una armónica que se une a un conocido forajido para proteger a una hermosa viuda de un asesino despiadado que trabaja para el ferrocarril.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Sangre, sudor y gloria
programme.desc: Un equipo de fisicoculturistas de Miami llevan una vida de lujo a través del secuestro y de la extorsión en esta comedia policial basada en una historia real.

programme.title: Mátalos suavemente
programme.desc: Durante la crisis económica de 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), un sicario, es contratado para restablecer el orden después de que tres idiotas roban una partida de póquer protegida por la mafia.

programme.title: La Trampa
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar, Adrien Brody, Antonio Banderas y John Malkovich protagonizan esta atrapante y explosiva historia policial sobre tres criminales atrapados en un depósito tras un asalto.

programme.title: Los intocables
programme.desc: El clásico enfrentamiento entre el bien y el mal, con Kevin Costner como el agente federal Eliot Ness, Robert De Niro como el jefe mafioso Al Capone y Sean Connery como Malone.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: Búfalo americano
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones y su joven aprendiz conspiran para robar una valiosa cabeza de búfalo de níquel. Gran parte de la historia transcurre en la tienda de segunda mano del drogadicto Don Dubrow.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: El vuelo
programme.desc: Un piloto logra evitar que un vuelo se estrelle, pero la investigación del fallo revela algo inquietante.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: El aviador
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese captura los primeros años de esta gran figura de Estados Unidos, Howard Hughes, en esta aclamada biografía ganadora del Oscar protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio y Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Código de honor
programme.desc: Cuando su familia es asesinada, un agente de Operaciones Especiales se convierte en justiciero. Podrá su antiguo protegido, ahora agente del FBI, detenerlo antes de que la mafia y la policía se acerquen?

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: La máquina asesina
programme.desc: Un asesino entrenado en la Unión Soviética está decidido a escapar de su doble vida de asesino a sueldo y padre.

programme.title: Juego final
programme.desc: Un agente del servicio secreto (Cuba Gooding Jr.) y una reportera (Angie Harmon) investigan la conspiración detrás del asesinato del presidente de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras
programme.desc: Las tortugas vuelven para pelear contra más villanos junto a su nuevo aliado Casey Jones. Cuando el supervillano Shredder escapa con su plan de conquistar al mundo, los hermanos se preparan para vencerlo, pero enfrentarán a una mayor amenaza: Krang.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Las tortugas ninja están mejor que nunca en este éxito de taquilla cargado de acción y risas imparables. Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York está en problemas, le corresponde salvarla a estos cuatro hermanos ninja, amantes de la pizza.

programme.title: Tortugas Ninja 2: fuera de las sombras
programme.desc: Las tortugas vuelven para pelear contra más villanos junto a su nuevo aliado Casey Jones. Cuando el supervillano Shredder escapa con su plan de conquistar al mundo, los hermanos se preparan para vencerlo, pero enfrentarán a una mayor amenaza: Krang.

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold! La película
programme.desc: Un empresario despiadado tiene un plan malvado: destruir el barrio de Arnold y construir un gran centro comercial. El tiempo es corto, y alguien debe salvarlos a todos, esa persona es Arnold.

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Las tortugas ninja están mejor que nunca en este éxito de taquilla cargado de acción y risas imparables. Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York está en problemas, le corresponde salvarla a estos cuatro hermanos ninja, amantes de la pizza.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Últimas vacaciones
programme.desc: Una vendedora de utensilios de cocina de Nueva Orleáns cree que tiene menos de un mes de vida, por lo que parte en las vacaciones de sus sueños para vivir como si no hubiese un mañana.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Número De Suerte
programme.desc: John Travolta y Lisa Kudrow forman un "equipo de comedia de alta energía" en esta comedia divertida inspirada en una estafa de la vida real para ganar la lotería de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
programme.desc: Una mujer de 40 años le pide a su vecino de 23 años, a quien detesta, que finja ser su hijo durante un viaje de fin de semana para conseguir un trabajo que le permita regresar a la vida que perdió.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: La vida útil
programme.desc: Un empleado de cine se ajusta a su nueva vida después de que el cine en el que trabajó por más de 25 años se ve obligado a cerrar. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: Resucitados
programme.desc: Un grupo de investigadores médicos descubren una manera de revivir a los pacientes muertos.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: Fort Defiance
programme.desc: A former Civil War solider bent on killing the man whose surrender got his brother killed, later finds out a rancher wants that same man and his blind brother killed.

programme.title: Fort Bowie
programme.desc: Attempting to affect peace between his men and the Apaches, the commander of a fort unwittingly inspires an Indian massacre.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Silver Canyon
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram are sent by the cavalry to bring in raiders who are interfering with supply lines. Gene traces them to a small Army outpost where the outlaws set out to ravage the town.

programme.title: Valley Of Fire
programme.desc: Gene Autry is the new mayor of a lawless town. He has to rid the town of its gambling king and to import a group of gals to settle the men. Gene must out-gun renegades who want to kidnap the gals.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill And The Indians
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: A famous cat burglar who has retired to the Riviera catches a thief imitating his old style.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: The High and the Mighty
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Dan Roman, a veteran pilot haunted by a tragic past. Now relegated to second-incommand cockpit assignments, he finds himself scheduled on a routine Honolulu-to-San Francisco flight – one that takes a terrifying turn.

programme.title: Moby Dick (1956)
programme.desc: This stellar retelling of Melville's classic is unsurpassed in entertainment, imagination and high adventure. Consumed by an insane rage, Captain Ahab (Gregory Peck) has but one purpose in life - revenge on the great white whale who disfigured him.

programme.title: The Vikings
programme.desc: Legends Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Ernest Borgnine and Janet Leigh dazzle in this epic chronicle of brutal rivalry and bloodthirsty ambition as two brothers are locked in a battle that will decide their fate...and that of a beautiful princess.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and Carter buy Hong Kong suits from con man Friendly Freddy.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer tries to convince his friends that a movie star has invited them all to a barbecue at her house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to 'Old Mail Day', when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver Wendell Douglas returns from farm to firm... law firm, that is. When a young and ambitious local graduates from law school, he looks for a potential partner in Hooterville. Oliver is the logical choice. Lisa and Eb help the new venture.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After partnering with a young, local lawyer, Oliver has opened a new law office in Hooterville. However, their secretary, Lisa, shows a lack of necessary skills. Soon, Lisa's job is on the line, even if she is married to one of the partners.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When the Young Peoples Agricultural Society holds their annual convention in Washington, D.C., local members Eb, Mr. Kimball, and Arnold the pig get ready to make the big trip. Oliver and Lisa serve as unintended chaperones.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: While Lisa and Oliver consider what to do on their unplanned trip to Washington D.C., Mr. Haney rents their house to a family of eight. Meanwhile in the nation's capital, Lisa and Eb tour the White House, and Mr. Kimball makes official trouble.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a charmingly sweet doe wanders onto the Douglas farm, an enchanted Lisa befriends the beautiful animal. Having had her heart won over, Lisa resolves to have all deer hunting banned in Hooterville, winning support however necessary.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa becomes enchanted with the diary of a Lydia Plunkett. Found in an old trunk in the barn, the diary from 1898 tells Lydia's life story as a successful businesswoman. Eb and Lisa are glued to every page of the story, but Oliver isn't impressed.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney and Fred Ziffel try to persuade Oliver to invest in a new business venture. 'Looney Luke' Needlinger claim to have invented a machine that can turn hay into fresh milk. Oliver is skeptical and tries to prove the machine is a white lie.

programme.desc: The rookies are given "makeovers" to transform them into the image of a DCC.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The entire squad needs a wake-up call and guest choreographer Kitty Carter gives it to them.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final dance rehearsal of week 7 has a surprise guest judge who puts everyone on edge. Ultimately, in Kelli's office, the tears flow as some dreams surprisingly come to an end.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Join 65,000 screaming Cowboys fans as the cheerleaders hit the turf and wow the entire stadium and themselves during their first Dallas Cowboys football game of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad with all the emotion and drama as hundreds of women hope to fill the 45-member team.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: If the candidates thought auditions were tough, they have no idea how brutal training camp will be. Kelli has to call three girls into her office for warnings...who will survive the first week of training camp?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's only the third week of training camp and it's already time to make cuts. Who will survive? The week starts with uniform fittings where even the wannabes get to try on the famous blue and white star-studded outfit.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The girls are in the dark about what Kelli and salon director Rainer Schneck have planned for them when they get their dramatic Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: When DCC Director, Kelli Finglass, gives a former contestant a once-in-a-lifetime second chance to join training camp three weeks late, there is a lot of catching up to do.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: She's back! The notoriously demanding Kitty Carter comes to Valley Ranch to teach the intimidated DCC a technique class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy are forced to make tough decisions that are fair, but unfortunate. It's now or never for the remaining training camp candidates as there are only two rehearsals left before final cuts.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives in Portland, Ore., discover a puzzling connection between the 2018 murder of chef Dan Brophy and a blog post written years earlier titled, "How to Murder Your Husband"; insiders reveal exclusive details about the investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A professional poker player's gamble may have resulted in a murder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A risky undercover operation in a rough prison could expose a suspected serial killer's secrets.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The death of a mother of five tests a family's loyalty.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Florida father is determined to find out what happened to his daughter after her fatal fall from a penthouse apartment in Belgium.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a young, handsome veterinarian is found dead in his home in Montana, the mystery remains unsolved for nearly two decades.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A 21-year-old college senior is shot and killed in a public park just months before her graduation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives in Portland, Ore., discover a puzzling connection between the 2018 murder of chef Dan Brophy and a blog post written years earlier titled, "How to Murder Your Husband"; insiders reveal exclusive details about the investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Keith Morrison reports on a dramatic undercover operation in Palm Beach, Florida to save a wife and mother who had no idea she was in danger.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a beloved couple in South Carolina reveals a feud and divides a family.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a woman disappears after an encounter on a train, her family hires detectives to investigate.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mystery of a successful real estate entrepreneur killed by a car bomb spans nearly two decades.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: What Happens in Flavor Stays in Flavor
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is a good luck person. So he needs a good luck woman. To test the girls on this trait, he flies the seven remaining women to Vegas on his private jet.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: InterroGitted
programme.desc: There's six girls left so Flav brings out the big guns. He flies Brigitte Neilsen into town to get to know the girls a little better.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav's Trippin
programme.desc: Flav takes two of the young ladies to Palm Springs for a spa retreat where things get muddy, wet and crazy.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Family Flavors
programme.desc: Three girls are left! Things are getting serious so Flav decides it's time to meet the ladies' parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Slaps, Smacks, Screams and Spit You Never Saw
programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Finale)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Long Island's Laura Siano has big plans for big money--the three S's: save, spend and share. But this game also comes with M's: martinis and male models.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Rick, a poor student and loner at Degrassi, joins a committee in order to get to know Caitlin. Despite an unfriendly welcome from Kathleen, Caitlin supports Rick and they work together on a successful project.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: At one of Lucy's parties, Spike and Shane lock themselves in a bedroom, where one thing leads to another. When her period is late, Spike has to confront the consequences of her actions.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Wheels' real father shows up out of the blue, he must deal with his feelings about his adoptive parents, his birth parents and his own identity. Spike confirms that she is pregnant, and she approaches Wheels for advice on the option of abortion.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: To make Wheels jealous, Stephanie, the school president, appoints Joey as the Sports Rep., even though the post is supposed to be held by a seventh grader. As a result, the seventh grade class wants to impeach her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts journeys 40,000 years back in time on the trail of the great beasts of the ice age. This was the last time that giants like mammoths, woolly rhinos and sabre-toothed cats ruled our planet.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: As the girls continue to sever Rion's threads of fate, more of Rion's true feelings are revealed.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Un nuevo propietario de Nueva York recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando una inspección de la casa revela un cadáver momificado. Por décadas, el crimen no había sido descubierto. La víctima quedó desaparecida y el asesino, impune.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una serie de robos e invasiones de propiedad tuvieron lugar en el área de Detroit. Los ladrones resultaron ser parte de una banda local apodada “Los invasores de casas”, cuyos crímenes abarcaban fraudes al seguro, robo, y operaciones ilegales.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los años ochenta, el FBI tuvo una batalla de inteligencia con un astuto ladrón de bancos. Él hacía una planificación meticulosa y ejecutaba sus crímenes con precisión militar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Nueva York, el FBI y la policía local unieron fuerzas para combatir el ingreso constante de cocaína de Colombia por los puertos de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1987, siete reos escaparon de una prisión de máxima seguridad en Nuevo México. Los fugados, todos criminales violentos, eran una amenaza para cualquiera que se cruzara en su camino.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Se descubre el botín de un ladrón que insiste que lo iba a donar. Encuentran objetos ilícitos en el coche de un supuesto aficionado de beisbol. Muchos problemas vienen por tener vidrios teñidos.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un retén termina mal cuando un conductor que parece cooperar se irrita. Un delincuente de tráfico es capturado con más que una licencia suspendida. Una mujer problemática ignora el aviso de desalojo.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una mujer desafiante toma una mala decisión mientras su novio no interviene. Una etiqueta falsa y una historia confusa no pasan la prueba de indagación. Un padre y un hijo pelean en público.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: La policía enfrenta a una pareja en una parada de autobús y todo se complica. Él le llama a su novia para cancelar una fiesta. Se reportó que conducía ebria, pero ella jura que es una trampa del exmarido.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo vuelve para apoyar a su socio en el delito. Una investigación de autos da lugar a persecución. Un tipo que admite haber consumido drogas dice que lo hace de forma responsable.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Se persigue a un hombre en un ciclomotor chatarra que no corre más de 40mph. Una mujer culpa a su previa relación tóxica por lo que hay en su auto. Un conductor errático pone a los oficiales en alerta.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Una persecución nocturna termina en el jardín de una casa y la policía busca pistas. Una mujer harta habla al grano con un hombre que evita la realidad. Un policía anima a un veterano con mala suerte.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Se escapa en el coche de su amigo cuando es atrapado en algo sospechoso. Niega que la ropa del coche sea suya antes de preguntárselo. Un hombre tira por el aire y pone nerviosos a sus vecinos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En una escena del crimen, cualquier cosa que quedó atrás o está fuera de lugar se considera una pista.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Los investigadores encuentran el cuerpo de una mujer y tienen poco tiempo y pocas pistas para encontrar al asesino, que podría atacar de nuevo.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo sufren un accidente en el desayuno que les trae muchos problemas. Mientras Jonathan necesita el apoyo de su familia para una presentación en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: The loss of her baby shatters Mary; the residents attempt to recover from the shock.

programme.desc: Laura thinks that Almanzo's departure means that he has a new girlfriend; Nellie undergoes a change due to Percival.

programme.desc: Almanzo does not want Laura to take a teaching job even though he manages to lose money in a bad property deal.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The new coach of the town's football team endangers the boys' spirits and health in his attempt to regain past glories.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The School for the Blind's caretaker sets out to become a respectable farmer so that he may adopt two orphaned brothers.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A mother tries to reunite with the daughter she abandoned, now a blind artist, but meets with hostility.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an “International Fair” on the playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney, and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the children have fun playing with and learning about busses and cars.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Get in the Valentine’s Day spirit with Lovey and Dovey, two holiday hearts excited to spread joy and celebrate their favorite day with dancing and singing! It’s a Valentine’s Day party for the whole family! Join the fun in Be My Valentine.

programme.desc: The 60's were coming-of-age years for The Rolling Stones. From the pubs of London to the concert halls of America, the 60s watched the Stones grow from a cover band to a powerhouse of rock!

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: The 70's were a decade of extremes for The Stones. They rose to the height of their collective creative prowess, spun downward under stardom's weight, then climbed up again.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: The 80's came to be the most trying decade that the Rolling Stones ever faced. As the world grew closer, the Stones drifted apart. Amidst mid-life crises and solo projects, the Stones almost broke up.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: It was during the 1990's that The Rolling Stones proved once and for all that rock and roll has no boundaries or age limits. They'd surge with fresh wind in their sails and new lands in their sights.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Just for the Record
programme.desc: From Swinging London to the new millennium, The Rolling Stones have become the longest running and most successful band in rock and roll history.

programme.title: The Story Of: The Kinks
programme.desc: Discover the inside story of the most influential English rock band of the 60’s. Inspired by a mix of genres including rhythm and blues, folk and country, their music created a British Invasion around the world! Their third single "You Really Got Me" b...

programme.title: The Story of James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown is one of the founders of funk music and is a major figure of 20th century music and dance. This program features interviews with the man himself, live performances, interviews with band members Bobby Byrd and Maceo Parker Jr.

programme.title: The Story of Jay-Z
programme.desc: Jay-Z is one of the most talented, successful and acclaimed musicians of all time. He changed the game and without him, music - and more specifically hip hop - would not be in the medium it is today.

programme.title: Tim McGraw & Faith Hill: Country Lovin'
programme.desc: They met by chance but, alas, it was bad timing. He proposed in a trailer dressing room. She responded with lipstick kisses on a mirror. A blending of music and marriage that defies time. Soul 2 Soul. The best goes on…….

programme.title: Tina Turner: Simply the Best
programme.desc: The odds were against her. Learn how singer Tina Turner reached super-stardom with her high energy and gravelly voice and prevailed as the "Queen of Rock 'n' Roll". Learn how Tina prevailed then reached solo superstardom with songs like "Private Dancer".

programme.title: Tom Petty: Won't Back Down
programme.desc: Tom Petty is recognized as one of rock's greatest singer-songwriters.

programme.title: U2: Rockumentary
programme.desc: A cliche start: 4 teenage boys form a rock band in the drummer's kitchen. 45 years, 14 albums, 24 concert tours, 22 Grammies. U2 raises millions to fight hunger, disease and poverty. Music transcends melody. It means mission.
